targets.expr: 100 - ((node_filesystem_avail_bytes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint="/", fstype!="rootfs"} * 100) / node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", mountpoint="/", fstype!="rootfs"})

avg_over_time({compose_service=~"$compose_service", event="http.response"} | json | __error__="" | method="GET" | pathname !~ "/_app/.*" | pathname !~ "/favicon.*" | pathname !~ "/images/.*" | pathname !~ "/api/.*" | unwrap duration_ms [$__interval]) by ()

quantile_over_time(0.95, {compose_service=~"$compose_service", event="http.response"} | json | __error__="" | method="GET" | pathname !~ "/_app/.*" | pathname !~ "/favicon.*" | pathname !~ "/images/.*" | pathname !~ "/api/.*" | unwrap duration_ms [$__interval]) by ()
avg_over_time({compose_service=~"$compose_service", event="client.log"} | json | __error__="" | source="browser" | unwrap durationMs [$__interval]) by ()

quantile_over_time(0.95, {compose_service=~"$compose_service", event="http.response"} | json | __error__="" | method="GET" | pathname !~ "/_app/.*" | pathname !~ "/favicon.*" | pathname !~ "/images/.*" | pathname !~ "/api/.*" | unwrap duration_ms [$__interval]) by ()
topk(10, sum by (pathname) (count_over_time({compose_service=~"$compose_service", event="http.response"} | json | __error__="" | slow_tier=~"warn|critical" | pathname != "" [$__range])))
avg_over_time({compose_service=~"$compose_service", event="client.log"} | json | __error__="" | source="browser" | unwrap durationMs [$__interval]) by ()
topk(10, sum by (pathname, type) (count_over_time({compose_service=~"$compose_service", event="client.log"} | json | __error__="" | source="browser" |~ "durationMs" | pathname != "" [$__range])))
